leads.topic: Magnetiq - the workshop library platform itself

leads.topic: Two workshop sessions - topics TBD

leads.topic: Empire Builder V3 - leaderboards, Empires, and token mechanics. How it works, how to use it, and why it matters for your build.

leads.name: Joshua.eth
leads.topic: Bonfire and the ZABAL Bonfire bot - point your agent at it to follow ZABAL Gamez in real time.

leads.name: Ohnahji
leads.topic: His journey in live streaming - how to start and grow your own stream.

leads.name: Adrian
leads.topic: Empire Builder V3 - a conversation on the V3 endpoints for an existing empire plus the leaderboard, and optionally deploying a new empire.

leads.name: Duo Do
leads.topic: Musician on Farcaster, and the road to Farcon.
leads.format: pre-recorded talk plus live Q and A
leads.when: first week of June - date TBD

leads.name: Jonathan Colton
leads.topic: Two talks - FounderCheck (founder validation), and propagating your work on Farcaster as a developer.

leads.name: kmac.eth
leads.topic: Farcaster Snaps - building and shipping interactive Snaps.

leads.name: Cassie
leads.topic: The Farcaster protocol, ins and outs - a live build-along.

leads.name: Plat0x
leads.topic: His own Bonfire builder session - going deeper on the ZABAL Bonfire and building on the graph.

leads.name: Joseph Goats
leads.topic: Owning your music as an independent artist on Farcaster - releasing, owning your masters and your audience, and turning listeners into a community that pays you directly.

leads.name: Will T of Web3
leads.topic: Building KFMEDIA℠ - what he is building, how he is doing it, and the lessons so far.

leads.name: Adam Miller
leads.topic: Talking miDAO with Adam Miller - what he is building, and how digital creators and DAOs can use it.

leads.name: Zaal
leads.topic: ZABAL Gamez and the projects you can build on - an overview plus a tour of the ecosystem, including ZAO Fractals.
leads.format: Live at the WIP meetup, recorded

leads.name: Fireside chat with Sopha
leads.topic: A special event introducing Sopha to the community - the philosophy and the building behind it, with an informal hang after.
leads.format: Live on Sopha + Google Meet, ~1 hour

leads.name: Jub Jub
leads.topic: Farcaster Batches, and a conversation about the builders and the mentality of the people of Farcaster.

leads.name: Adrienne
leads.topic: Building Warpee.eth, an AI agent for a media company on Farcaster.
leads.format: Live talk plus Q and A, recorded

leads.name: Dr. Jake
leads.topic: Growth through foundations.
leads.format: Live talk plus Q and A, recorded

leads.name: Kenny
leads.topic: Talking POIDH - the bounty platform Kenny built and how to use it, plus finalizing the Best ZABAL Gamez Ad bounty and kicking off a new two-week bounty.

leads.name: Dan Singjoy
leads.topic: Eden Fractal and the fractal ecosystem - what fractals are, the history of fractal communities, and how it connects to ZAO Fractal.

leads.name: Chris Dolinsky
leads.topic: Vini App - a 30-minute look at what he is building, for the ZABAL Gamez community to try.

leads.name: Ali Tiknazoglu
leads.topic: Previbecoding - what he is learning building with AI tooling, for people who are learning to code now.
leads.format: Live talk plus Q and A, recorded

leads.name: Aziz (MotoMoto)
leads.topic: Non-Dev to Shipped - how he built Baraza Protocol with zero coding background by directing AI tools. A phone-first treasury for chamas and SACCOs, part of BAD DAO's four-product loop. He shows the exact method so anyone in /zabal can copy it this week.

leads.name: AZKAL
leads.topic: Building FlowStage - why he built it and a short live demo. FlowStage helps artists scale their content without losing their taste: short-form videos and slideshows from your own footage and audio, organized by aesthetics, no generative AI. Plus how builders can connect into it through the FlowStage API.

leads.name: Meta Mu
leads.topic: How to add value as a community member - how to find the gaps, fill them, and become someone a community cannot do without. Simple, repeatable ways to contribute that turn into reputation, trust, and real opportunity.

leads.name: The Farcaster Intern
leads.topic: ZABAL GAMEZ AMA w/ The Farcaster Intern - an open-mic audio-space AMA. BetterCallZaal hosts @farcaster; come up and ask anything about Farcaster, or send your question ahead and we open with the most-liked.

leads.name: Nemesis.love
leads.topic: Come Into the Mind of a Menace - a creator-track personal story: the career, the journey, the decision to leave the old path, and how that leap led to building and creating in this space.

_schema.name: person's name
_schema.spec_url: optional - link to the deeper spec / meeting recap
_schema.color: ZAO palette key: orange | cyan | gold | pink | zabal
_schema.track: optional - artist | builder | creator. Shows a colored track badge on the schedule when set.
_schema.date: optional - YYYY-MM-DD start date; the top CTA auto-picks the earliest upcoming dated lead
_schema.luma_url: optional - per-event Luma invite link (used by the top CTA RSVP button + schedule)
_schema.thumbnail: optional - /assets path to the workshop thumbnail image

cta_override._comment: manual override for the top CTA. active:true uses headline/event_url/event_label; active:false = auto (next dated workshop).
cta_override.headline: Next workshop: Cassie on the Farcaster protocol, ins and outs - Fri Jun 12, 7:30pm EST.
